summary: Incomplete deliverable. Missing tests/artifact_cleanup.bats (workflow references it at line 72 but file not provided), required act-result.txt generation, and actionlint validation step. Smoke-test job (lines 75-130+) is repetitive—each assertion re-runs the script instead of capturing once and parsing; should consolidate. Script quality is decent with good error handling and clear structure, but TDD requirement (write failing test first) not evidenced. Critical missing components prevent this from meeting requirements.
